success_admin.description: ADMIN changes target role. Audit log includes previous_role and new_role.

failure_self_role_change_403.description: Admin cannot change their own role. Audit log written with reason=self_role_change_blocked.

failure_invalid_role_422.description: Invalid role value rejected by Pydantic. No silent fallback.

failure_auditor_403.description: AUDITOR role is not allowed to change roles (SR-11).
